texto: Everyone is always doing as well as they can within their personal limitations, their personal history, what they know and don't know and what they're feeling in that moment. If they could make a healthier decision, they would. This includes you.
explicacao: Citação de Carl Alasko sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Everyone is always doing as well as they can within their personal limitations, their personal hi…” articula reflexao, compassion, personal em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
